channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: SpaceX needs to grow 60x in a decade to justify a $1.75 trillion valuation. No company has ever come close
item.description: SpaceX's valuation sets a high bar for what it must achieve to reward investors.

item.title: Elon Musk bullet-proofed his $1 trillion Mars-shot pay at SpaceX after the epic battle over his $56 billion moonshot at Tesla
item.description: The CEO will have near-complete control of his space company without colonizing Mars.

item.title: A CEO denied raises to spend money on AI instead. Companies have no idea what they need in a workforce when the AI race is over
item.description: Companies may cut raises and benefits to create attrition, an expert says.

item.title: ICC Secretary General: The real Hormuz clock is agricultural, not diplomatic
item.description: The true deadline for a Hormuz closure is agricultural, and by the time a food crisis emerges, the decisions behind it will be six months old.
